creator: lioux@uol.com.br
text:
Simple update from version 0.3.0 to 1.0.0

+ Removed: no files or directories removed
+ Added:
	patches/patch-ab

The patches fix 1 odd behavior detected on -stable
as of 13/08/2000.

patches/patch-aa fixes a weird compile optimization error
patches/patch-ab fixes some path dependencies in the kicq-upgrade
		 script

How-To-Repeat: 
n/a
